name: shadcn-ui-rebuild
title: shadcn UI Rebuild
description: Rebuild the shared shadcn/ui layer with the Nova preset, Zinc base colors, default shadcn theme colors, Lucide standard component icons, and JetBrains Mono for code.
creator: Ziphyrien
notes: Production build verification is blocked by an unrelated vite-plus/node binary issue. Manual visual QA remains follow-up work; custom UI icon imports have been migrated to Lucide.

meta.customPanelAlignment: settings panels compose Card, Alert, Empty, and Field instead of hardcoded square containers
